title: Refinitiv Eikon ESG Score
description: Schema for ESG (Environmental, Social, and Governance) scores from the Refinitiv Eikon Data Platform.

esgCombinedScore.description: Combined ESG score including controversies impact.

environmentPillarScore.description: Environmental pillar score covering resource use, emissions, and innovation.

socialPillarScore.description: Social pillar score covering workforce, human rights, community, and product responsibility.

governancePillarScore.description: Corporate governance pillar score covering management, shareholders, and CSR strategy.

controversiesScore.description: Controversies score reflecting ESG incidents and controversies.

period.description: Reporting period for the ESG scores.

measures.description: Detailed ESG measure fields keyed by field name.
